hero.title: The Z·START Method
hero.subtitle: A proprietary 6-phase framework to build your digital business with industrial precision.

step1.title: Z — Zero Point
step1.description: Complete analysis and diagnosis: where you are, where you want to go, and what's blocking you. No guessing — data, numbers, and truth. The starting point for every strategic decision.

step2.title: S — Strategy
step2.description: We transform Zero Point data into a clear action plan. We define WHO you want to reach, WHAT makes you unique, and HOW you position yourself in the market.

step3.title: T — Technology
step3.description: Strategy becomes concrete infrastructure. Website, automations, CRM, funnels: everything needed to make your digital business run like a well-oiled machine.

step4.title: A — Activation
step4.description: We launch everything to market with targeted campaigns, strategic content, and optimized funnels. We monitor performance from day one to optimize in real time.

step5.title: R — Results
step5.description: Business becomes scientific. We analyze data, identify what works and what doesn't, and optimize every element to maximize ROI.

step6.title: T — Transformation
step6.description: The phase that separates surviving businesses from thriving ones. We plan strategic evolution, new opportunities, and system scalability.

timelines.title: How long does it take?
timelines.disclaimer: Timelines refer to building your digital ecosystem. Business results grow progressively in the following months through the method's optimization cycles.

casiStudio.title: Case Studies
casiStudio.subtitle: Real results. Real systems. Built with the Z·START Method.
casiStudio.study1Brief: Channel built from zero with AI-optimized content: 140,000+ YouTube views and 100,000+ Facebook views in under 30 days. Zero ads.
casiStudio.study1Body1: I built a channel with AI-optimized content. In under 30 days: 140,000+ YouTube views (32,000+ on a single video) and 100,000+ on Facebook. Pure organic traffic, zero ads.
casiStudio.study1Body2: Result? Zero clients. Because without a system that converts traffic, you only have numbers on a screen.
casiStudio.study1Body3: That lesson — learned the hard way — is why the Z·START Method exists.
casiStudio.study1GifCaption: 32,000+ views on a single video · Click to watch
casiStudio.study1Quote: Content brings people. The system converts them. I build both.
casiStudio.study2Brief: First complete digital infrastructure launched by Marketizzati: full-stack PWA with AI, Stripe payments and 200+ features — live in less than 1 month.
casiStudio.study2Headline: From zero to production in less than 1 month.
casiStudio.study2Body1: lurumi.it is a full-stack PWA for the crochet world: AI integrated for generating patterns and images, Stripe payments, over 200 features including counters, projects, tutorials and AI chat.
casiStudio.study2Body2: Built entirely with the Marketizzati Digital Factory — the same system I offer my clients. Not a demo, a real product with real users.
casiStudio.study2Body3: It's concrete proof that the Z·START Method works: from idea to production, without months of attempts.
casiStudio.study2Quote: I build digital systems before selling them.
